SEARCH
Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.model

Class BotSettings

java.lang.Object
com.monkey.mcbot.api.model.BotSettings
public final class BotSettings extends Object
Immutable settings payload used to configure bot behavior and editable limits.

Instances are created through a strict step-builder exposed by builder(). The builder enforces an explicit order and validates logical constraints such as:

  • combat=true requires follow=true
  • default values must stay inside their configured min/max ranges
  • range boundaries must be coherent (min <= max)

Use these settings in BotSpawnRequest.Builder.settings(BotSettings) to spawn bots.
